title: Political rally in Kumhrar draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Kumhrar promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Kumhrar
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Kumhrar assembly segment.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Kumhrar
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Kumhrar constituency.

title: High stakes battle in Kumhrar as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Kumhrar. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
